name: No-Peek Chicken
recipeIngredient: 1 can Condensed Cream of Chicken soup (10 3/4 oz)
1 can Condensed Cream of Celery soup (10 3/4 oz)
1 package Dry Onion Soup & Dip Mix (1 1/2 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 300°F.
2. Mix Minute Rice and both cans of soup in a 13" x 9" baking dish.
3. Distribute mixture evenly in the bottom of the dish.
4. Place chicken pieces in a single layer on top of the rice-soup mixture.
5. Sprinkle dry onion soup over the top.
6. Cover tightly and bake at 300°F for 2 1/2 hours.
